setup.content:
## Components

- **Identity cards** — Monarch, Loyalists, Rebels, Traitor
- **Hero cards** — legendary Three Kingdoms characters with unique skills
- **Game cards** — Basic, Strategy (Scroll), and Equipment cards
- **Health cards** — track each hero's remaining health

## Setup Steps

1. **Draw identity** — each player draws one face down. The **Monarch reveals immediately**; all others stay hidden.
2. **Select hero** — Monarch chooses from **5 heroes**; others choose from **3 each**. Reveal your hero.
3. **Monarch bonus** — Monarch gets **+1 maximum health**.
4. **Starting hand** — starting from the Monarch (counterclockwise), each player draws **4 cards**.

## Player Count (Standard 8)

| Role | Count |
|------|-------|
| Monarch (主公) | 1 |
| Loyalist (忠臣) | 2 |
| Rebel (反贼) | 4 |
| Traitor (内奸) | 1 |

roles.content:
## Identity Overview

| Role | Team | Victory Condition |
|------|------|-------------------|
| **Monarch (主公)** | Ruler | Eliminate all Rebels and the Traitor |
| **Loyalist (忠臣)** | Ruler | Protect the Monarch; eliminate Rebels and Traitor |
| **Rebel (反贼)** | Rebel | Eliminate the Monarch |
| **Traitor (内奸)** | Solo | Be the **last player standing** (Monarch must die last) |

## Key Rules

- Only the **Monarch** reveals their identity at the start.
- Loyalists and Traitor are **hidden** — deduce allegiance from actions.
- **Rebels win immediately** when the Monarch dies, even if all Rebels are also dead.
- The **Traitor** must survive until they are the sole remaining player; killing the Monarch too early helps Rebels win.

## Team Dynamics

- Monarch + Loyalists share a team but Loyalists are secret allies.
- Traitor pretends to help the Monarch while eliminating everyone else.

turn-phases.content:
## Six Phases (in order)

| # | Phase | What Happens |
|---|-------|--------------|
| 1 | **Preparation (准备)** | Trigger start-of-turn hero abilities |
| 2 | **Judgment (判定)** | Resolve delayed strategy cards (see **Judgment Phase**) |
| 3 | **Draw (摸牌)** | Draw **2 cards** from the deck |
| 4 | **Play (出牌)** | Use cards and hero abilities (see **Play Phase**) |
| 5 | **Discard (弃牌)** | Discard down to **current health** (hand limit) |
| 6 | **End (结束)** | Trigger end-of-turn hero abilities |

## Turn Direction

Turns proceed **counterclockwise**, starting from the Monarch.

## Skipping Phases

Some effects (e.g. **Contentment / 乐不思蜀**) can skip the **Play Phase**.

judge-phase.content:
## When It Happens

At the start of your turn, **before drawing cards**, resolve all cards in your **judgment zone**.

## Resolution Order

Process delayed cards in **reverse order of placement** (last placed = first resolved).

## How to Judge

1. Flip the top card of the deck — this is the **judgment result**.
2. Apply the effect based on the card's **suit and number**.
3. The judgment card is then **discarded**.

## Delayed Cards

| Card | Effect |
|------|--------|
| **Contentment (乐不思蜀)** | If result is **NOT Hearts** → skip your **Play Phase** |
| **Lightning (闪电)** | If **Spade 2–9** → take **3 damage**; otherwise pass left |

## Nullification

Any player may play **Nullification (无懈可击)** to cancel a judgment effect before it resolves.

play-phase.content:
## What You Can Do

During your Play Phase, you may:

- Play **Basic cards** (Slash, Dodge, Peach)
- Play **Strategy cards** (scrolls)
- Equip **Equipment** (weapons, armor, horses)
- Activate **hero abilities** (as allowed by your character)

## Key Limits

- **1 Slash per turn** (unless a hero ability or weapon removes this limit)
- **Dodge** is normally played in response, not during your own Play Phase
- **Distance** determines who you can target (see **Equipment**)

## Playing Cards

1. Declare the card and target(s).
2. Other players may respond (Dodge, Nullification, etc.).
3. Resolve the effect.

## End of Play Phase

Proceed to **Discard Phase** — hand size cannot exceed current health.

basic-cards.content:
## Slash (杀) — Attack

- Target **one player within range**
- Deals **1 damage** if not dodged
- Limit: **1 per turn** (unless hero ability says otherwise)
- Cannot be played if no valid target in range

## Dodge (闪) — Defense

- Played **in response** to a Slash targeting you
- Negates that Slash's damage
- Also required to respond to **Archery Attack (万箭齐发)**
- Some heroes can use black cards as Dodge

## Peach (桃) — Heal

- **On your turn**: restore **1 health** to yourself (cannot exceed max)
- **Any time**: save a player in **dying state** (health = 0)
- If no one plays a Peach on a dying player, they are **eliminated**

strategy-cards.content:
## Instant Scrolls

| Card | Effect |
|------|--------|
| **Something from Nothing (无中生有)** | Draw **2 cards** for yourself |
| **Dismantle (过河拆桥)** | Discard **1 card** from any player (hand or equipped) |
| **Snatch (顺手牵羊)** | Take **1 card** from a player within **distance 1** |
| **Duel (决斗)** | Challenge one player — alternate discarding Slashes; first who cannot takes **1 damage** |
| **Barbarian Assault (南蛮入侵)** | All other players must play a **Slash** or take **1 damage** |
| **Archery Attack (万箭齐发)** | All other players must play a **Dodge** or take **1 damage** |
| **Peach Garden (桃园结义)** | All players recover **1 health** (cannot exceed max) |
| **Bountiful Harvest (五谷丰登)** | Reveal cards equal to player count; each player picks one in order |

## Delayed Scrolls

| Card | Effect |
|------|--------|
| **Contentment (乐不思蜀)** | Place on another player — if judged NOT Hearts, skip their **Play Phase** |
| **Lightning (闪电)** | Place on yourself — passes left each turn; Spade 2–9 = **3 damage** |

## Nullification (无懈可击)

Cancel **any strategy card**. Can be played by anyone at any time (including in response to another Nullification).

equipment.content:
## Equipment Slots

Each player has 4 equipment slots (one of each type):

| Slot | Effect |
|------|--------|
| **Weapon (武器)** | Increases **attack range**; some grant special effects (e.g. extra Slashes) |
| **Armor (防具)** | Passive protection (e.g. ignore certain attacks) |
| **+1 Horse (防御马)** | Other players' **distance to you** is increased by 1 |
| **-1 Horse (进攻马)** | Your **distance to others** is decreased by 1 |

## Range & Distance

- **Adjacent players** are at distance **1**
- You can only **Slash** targets within your **attack range**
- **Snatch (顺手牵羊)** requires distance **1** to target
- Equipping a new item in the same slot **replaces** the old one (discarded)

## Equipping

Play an equipment card during your **Play Phase**. It stays in your equipment zone until replaced or discarded.

death-rules.content:
## Dying State

When a player's health reaches **0**, they enter the **dying state**:

1. Any player may play a **Peach (桃)** to restore them to **1 health**.
2. The dying player may play Peaches on themselves if they have any.
3. If no Peach is played, the player is **eliminated**.

## Rewards & Penalties

| Who Died | Effect |
|----------|--------|
| **Rebel (反贼)** killed | The **killer draws 3 cards** |
| **Loyalist (忠臣)** killed | The **Monarch discards all hand cards and all equipment** |
| **Traitor (内奸)** killed | Same as Loyalist — **Monarch discards all hand cards and equipment** |
| **Monarch (主公)** killed | **All identities are revealed**; check victory conditions |

## After Death

- Dead players' cards are **discarded** (unless a hero ability says otherwise).
- Eliminated players take no further turns but may still win if their team condition is met.
- **Rebels win** as soon as the Monarch dies, regardless of other survivors.
